entry.title: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Did you ever learn a new language? Then you know how much training and practical experience is required to know the grammar, learn the vocabulary and become fluent. Joule has mastered this journey now and finally is able to speak ABAP! 😊

 

 

Introduction

“At SAP, the most valuable language is ABAP” – Jensen Huang, Founder and CEO of NVIDIA (Sapphire Key Note 2024).

ABAP is SAP’s proprietary programming language and ABAP technology is the solid foundation for both the classic ERP and SAP’s flagship ERP SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Bundled with our strong ABAP development community, the impact and the value of generative AI support for ABAP is obvious. Consequently, SAP decided to invest heavily in the development of Joule skills as well as training and fine-tuning large language models specifically for ABAP.

Now – more than one year of investment after the initial announcement at SAP TechEd 2023, and the refresher end of 2024, we are super happy and proud to announce the general availability of our Joule copilot for ABAP developers in ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse as well as the ABAP AI SDK powered by the Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management!

 

Overview over ABAP AI use cases

Our use cases can be grouped into three categories.

Accelerate: Comprises all Joule skills which make ABAP developers more efficient. Besides the Joule integration in ABAP Development Tools itself, the first scope of skills comprises Predictive Code Completion, Unit Test generation for ABAP classes and CDS Views as well as ABAP and CDS code explanation.

Example for Joule's ABAP CDS Explain skill

 

Empower: We empower ABAP developers to infuse AI capabilities into their solutions and extensions. The ABAP AI SDK powered by the Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management (ISLM) is an easy-to-consume ABAP client providing full access to the SAP BTP Generative AI Hub.

Transform: The transformation of customer and partner code from the classic ERP towards SAP S/4HANA and further towards a clean core is one of the major challenges for many of our customers. We will assist with generative AI in this endeavor starting later in 2025.

In this blog post we are now concentrating on the Accelerate and the Empower use case. Further information on the Transform use case will follow later in 2025.

 

Accelerate your ABAP development

Which products are supported?

Joule’s ABAP skills are available in:

  • SAP BTP ABAP Environment
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition as of release 2025.

Supporting lower releases of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition is currently in evaluation.

Get started for free!

License: In order to leverage Joule’s capabilities, you need to purchase an additional license: 8019124 – Joule for developers limited promotion, ABAP. Please check SAP Note 3571857 for details. This license is a limited promotion free of charge until September 15th 2025 and can be purchased until August 15th 2025.

The future commercial model is currently in finalization, updates will follow.

Architecture and Set-Up: The architecture follows the general guiding principles of all Joule capabilities at SAP.

High-level overview over Joule.

 All requests to large language models are routed from ABAP to the AI foundation on SAP BTP. The use cases in the Accelerate category are managed by SAP. Once the subscription explained above is in place, the configuration part in your system is done automatically by SAP. Finally, update your ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse to the latest version to get the Joule integration in the IDE. Developers who shall be allowed to use Joule need the respective authorizations as explained in the documentation.

Learn how to use Joule

Explore Joule’s new ABAP skills by working through our tutorial on github. For details on specific features, check out our documentation.

You wonder what could be the technical foundation in ABAP to integrate Joule in ABAP Development Tools and offer all Joule skills for ABAP developers? It is the ABAP AI SDK powered by ISLM, the main deliverable of the Empower use case. And the good news is, we offer the entire ABAP AI SDK functionality to you as well, to realize your own AI use cases! Continue reading the next section for the details.

 

You are empowered!

With the ABAP AI SDK powered by ISLM we empower you to infuse AI capabilities into your own custom applications and solutions. This way you benefit from the same comfort as SAP for realizing AI use cases in ABAP.

Which products are supported?

The ABAP AI SDK powered by ISLM is available in:

  • SAP BTP ABAP Environment 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and OnPrem as of release 2025 via standard delivery. Lower releases of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and OnPrem are supported via Transport-based Correction Instructions (TCI), see details in SAP Note 3513374 and the SAP Notes and instructions linked therein.

Get started!

License: The AI capabilities of SAP BTP are offered through the SAP AI Core service. Customers need to have their own instance of SAP AI Core to be used from ABAP via the ABAP AI SDK. There is no separate license or pricing from ABAP perspective, the entire licensing and pricing is according to the SAP AI Core service.

Architecture and Set-Up: The architecture follows the general guiding principles of all Joule capabilities at SAP. All requests to large language models are routed from ABAP to the AI foundation on SAP BTP. For Empower use case, an own instance of SAP AI Core needs to be used and the communication between the ABAP system and this instance needs to be configured. Finally the AI scenarios are managed by the ISLM. Find all details for the ABAP AI SDK with step-by-step instructions in the documentation. For details on the ISLM, please see the list of references given below.

 

Find more information

This is a summary of important sources of further information. More details will follow and will be published and linked here. Please

  • Keep track of ongoing developments and news by following our SAP community.
  • Make use of our FAQ page for generative AI for ABAP to get many frequent questions answered. The FAQ will be updated regularly.
  • Consult the SAP Help documentation for details regarding all features.
  • Find the region mapping between SAP BTP ABAP Environment and SAP AI Core in SAP Note 3566760.
  • Watch the recordings of Devtoberfest and the SAP BTP ABAP Environment Roundtable #19 for demos of the initial scope.
  • Check out the ISLM documentation (or this version for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition) for more information on the Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management.
    Visit the ISLM community page for further guidance and watch the corresponding Devtoberfest session.
  • Read the story of John the developer and get a first impression in this video.

 

Roadmap

After the initial delivery, more features and skills will follow in upcoming releases. See our roadmap to know what’s already in the planning.

With that, the only thing left to say is: Have fun talking ABAP with Joule! 😊

entry.title: #12 - Discover Post-Live Resources
entry.content:
Post-live resources provide ongoing support and help address any issues that arise after the system is live, ensuring a smooth transition to regular operations. 

Picture 1 - Example for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

What’s New  

The What’s New Viewer is an SAP help page for each solution which allows our customers to find the deprecated, changed, and new features between your as-is and to-be SAP Solution release. This is presented in a downloadable list format that can be filtered, it provides a short description to better understand the capabilities delivered and links to technical information of the delivered innovations. 

Release Assessment and Scope Dependency Tool (SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, only) 

The release assessment and scope dependency is a simple, self-learning tool for the customers of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This tool enables the ease of consumption and adoption of impacts, improvements, and innovations which are rolled out with each release and upgrade. 
 
It presents to the customers, a tailor-made list of deleted, deprecated, new and changed objects like apps, APIs  CDS views, Scope Items etc. for each SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition release and continuous delivery. This list is filtered based on the customer’ s used and activated scope which means that the customers only see the changes relevant to them and not the entire list. 

Cloud ALM for operations 

SAP Cloud ALM for Operations empowers customers to understand the health of their SAP business solutions by providing full stack monitoring and alerting covering business processes, integration, users, applications, and health of cloud services and systems. It also allows them to conduct root cause analysis on different levels and act as a collaboration platform between LOB and IT. SAP Cloud ALM enables operations automation by integrating existing automation solutions. It also introduces intelligent event processing to enable event correlation and intelligent alerting to provide transparency regarding availability of business services including event calendar and service level management. 

Continuous Quality Check for Process Adoption (for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition only) 

Continuous Quality Check (CQC) are service reports with an executive summary, findings and a detailed action plan to mitigate risks or improve system usage. As a post live resource there are CQC which according to the solution focus on improving system usage and adopting the latest innovations, business process improvement, optimization of security and performance, monitor and reduce and data volume amongst others. Find more

 Benchmark value assessment (for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition only) 

This is a continuation from the benchmark performed at the discovery phase which output is a personalized scorecard in real-time showcasing a Key Performance Indicator analysis and process maturity gap on best practices in comparison to industry peers for all process areas contained in the solution. Find more here.

Go-Live Solution Adoption & Optimization (for SAP Fieldglass only) 

To get guidance on feature and functionality information, post-release feature adoption guidance, application best practice recommendations and product optimization/adoption, the Product Success Advisory from Fieldglass will offer guidance in a personalized way.  Find more here.

SAP Roadmap Explorer 

SAP Road Map Explorer empowers customers to easily build valuable road maps according to their unique needs update on a regular throughout the year. This is an interactive tool for effective decision making as it informs our customers on existing and upcoming innovations with detailed updates on product innovations allowing for customized filtering per product. Find more here.

Influence Portal 

The SAP Continuous Influence program provides our customers and partners with the opportunity to suggest improvements on SAP products directly to the development teams. This program is specifically aimed towards customers with productive licenses for SAP products and who would like to be able to suggest improvements in a continuously open channel. In addition, our customers can also find initiatives where SAP is looking for early adopters of certain functionalities for testing which grants early access and enhanced support for early testers. 

See more and understand how to influence and get influenced from SAP https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/influence-adopt 

Having questions, comments or feedbacks? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact 

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Check out other blogs from the series: Customer Onboarding at SAP.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author:

Daniel De Souza is Experience Owner for GROW with SAP at customer onboarding at SAP, bringing a decade of experience in customer management roles in a diverse set of industries and customer sizes. He possesses deep expertise in processes underlying the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition since the start of its commercialization. His strategic approach ensures customers effectively speed up time to value for their GROW with SAP subscriptions.

Having questions, comments or feedbacks? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact @DanielSouza .

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Configuring Serial Number Usage for Movement Types
entry.content:
Introduction

In inventory management, serial numbers play a crucial role in tracking and managing stock. Depending on your business requirements, you might need more flexibility in handling serial numbers to track and manage stock effectively. You can now define a different serial number usage for different movement types.

This blog post will guide you through how you can do this in your configuration environment using the configuration activity Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Types (106819). 

Why Configure Serial Number Usage? 

By default, serial number settings are defined in the serial number profile within the material master data. However, business scenarios such as goods receipts and goods issues may require different serial number handling. For instance, you might want optional serial numbers for goods receipts but mandatory ones for goods issues. This configuration allows for such flexibility. 

Prerequisites: 

  • Roles and Authorizations:  
    • For the Manage Your Solution app: The Business Process Expert is required. 
    • For the Customer Data Browser app: The Administrator (ADMINISTRATOR_DANA) user role is required.  It is included in the business catalog SAP_CORE_BC_CDB_PC. 
    • The business catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_LO_SER_PC (Serial Number Management - Configuration) must be assigned to your business role.   

 

Configuration Steps 

This configuration scenario is a two-step process: 

1. First, you must create a movement type group for your serial number profile which contains your desired serial number usage. For more information, see below or visit the SAP Help Portal: Step 1: Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Type 

2. Second, you assign the movement type group to the movement type. For more information, see below or visit the SAP Help Portal:  Step 2: Assign Group to Movement Type. 

 

Before You Start 

Before getting started, it is helpful to collect the required information from an existing material document that represents the process where you would like to change the serial number usage. We recommend the following: 

  1. Find a recent material document that represents the relevant process and copy the material document number. 
  2. With the user ADMINISTRATOR_DANA, enter the Customer Data Browser app.
  3. Choose the CDS Views table at the top. 
  4. Search for I_MATERIALDOCUMENTITEM_2 and select. 
  5. Use the search filters to find your material document. 
  6. Make a screenshot or copy the relevant fields for reference in the configuration activity.

Relevant fields for reference might include: Material Document, Number of Material Document, Material Number, Plant, Consumption Posting, GOODSMOVEMENTTYPEREFDOCTYPE, Special Stock Indicator, Special Stock Type, Receipt Indicator, and Movement Type. 

Step 1: Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Type 

In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the following activity: Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Types (106819). For more information, see Configuration Environment of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 

  1. Select the New Entries button to create a movement type group. 
  2. In the Movement Type Group column, create a 4-character movement type group name.
  3. Enter the relevant serial number profile. 
  4. In the Serial Number Usage column, use the drop down to select a usage type. 

     

Step 2: Assign Group to Movement Type

In the Assign Group to Movement Type segment, you can assign your newly created movement type group. 

  1. Select the Assign Group to Movement Type segment. 
  2. Find the movement type for the process where you require a different serial number usage. 
  3. In the Serial Number Movement Type Group column (Movement Type Group) of the relevant movement type, add your newly created movement type group. 

     

    4. If required, change the Receipt Indicator and the Consumption Posting to fit your needs. 

For more details, please see Define Serial Number Usage for Movement Types on the SAP Help Portal.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Microlearning has moved to SAP Learning
entry.content:
We are excited to announce a significant milestone in SAP's learning offering: The SAP Learning Platform now offers the full portfolio of learning videos that were known as 'openSAP Microlearning' up until now!
This marks an important step forward in SAP's goal to provide a consolidated learning experience for everyone.

Microlearning has been a highly successful and popular format for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud community. With the integration of the short videos into the SAP Learning Platform, all migrated Microlearnings are now accessible in the category Videos. 

Follow these links for direct access:

  1.  All Videos
  2. All SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Videos
  3. All SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Videos

You can also navigate the learning site via "Browse" - “By Learning Types” - “Videos” in the upper menu bar.

Use the filters to search for Product: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, or use keywords to search.

 

What does this migration mean for me?

The integration of openSAP Microlearning into the SAP Learning site means that all of the previously available Microlearnings will now be accessible within a comprehensive learning ecosystem. The old platform will cease operations in the course of 2025. Consequently, all content currently available on openSAP Microlearning will no longer be accessible.

 Why is this important?

  • The LSC Learning Platform consolidates various learning materials, making it easier for users to stay informed about the latest developments in SAP technologies.
  • In addition to familiar microlearning videos, the SAP Learning site offers a wide range of free, self-paced learning journeys and courses, enabling you to quickly acquire practical skills in key areas.
  • By bringing everything together on one platform, SAP ensures that all links and content remain current and functional.

What is next?

Enhanced options for filtering, playlists and integration with other sources in SAP Learning are underway. Stay tuned.

--------------
Read more about microlearning migration:

  • Blog post: openSAP Microlearning videos are now bite-sized learning videos on the SAP Learning site
  • FAQ from openSAP Microlearning.

----------------

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.  

🔎 Find All of Our Assets 

GROW with SAP is a comprehensive package designed to help businesses of all sizes to successfully adopt cloud ERP, anchored by SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for optimized processes and intelligent, sustainable operations. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: 通过限时促销免费获取SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502中的AI辅助功能！
entry.content:
在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition的2502版本中，SAP推出了一系列创新的AI辅助功能。为了让更多企业能够体验和应用这些前沿技术，以智能高效的方式，提升日常工作效率，优化业务协作体验。

目前，2502版本中包含的四个实用的AI辅助功能将通过 limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition，免费提供给申请用户限时使用。

下面让我们简单了解下这四个功能：

AI辅助智能汇总(AI-Assisted Smart Summarization)：在使用SAP Fiori元素的应用程序里，它能对业务对象页面进行汇总。这些汇总结果实用性极高，比如您可以快速将其复制粘贴到邮件中，开启后续操作，十分便捷。

AI辅助轻松过滤器(AI-Assisted Easy Filter）：在基于SAP Fiori元素开发的清单报表应用程序中，以往繁琐的筛选操作成为过去式。现在，您只需通过自然语言输入筛选条件，就能获取精准的查询结果，实现最贴合自身需求的过滤体验，极大提高了数据筛选的效率。

AI辅助财务业务洞察（AI-Assisted Financial Business Insights: Review Booklet for Cost Centers)：成本中心审查手册里的数据常常复杂难懂，但有了这个功能，一切迎刃而解。它能帮您挖掘数据背后的意义，突出数据间的依赖关系，还能用自然语言快速解释和汇总洞察，并且给出相应的操作建议，助力企业更高效地进行财务决策。

AI辅助固定资产折旧码注释（AI-assisted Explanation of Fixed Asset Depreciation Keys）：固定资产折旧码设置复杂，分析不同折旧区域的资产价值难度不小。而强大的SAP Business AI可以为您详细解释折旧码的运行方式以及折旧计算系统背后的原理，让您轻松理解折旧码的配置设置，有效提升资产会计和财务报告的效率与决策质量。

此次免费的限时促销的申请时间截止到2025年7月31日，中国地区目前仅支持台湾和香港的客户申请。用户可以通过limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition的链接提交申请，尽早体验这些创新功能。

让我们一起拥抱AI时代，开启企业高效运营的新篇章！

entry.title: Streamlining Goods Movements from Reservations
entry.content:
Introduction

Efficiently managing goods movement is crucial for maintaining smooth operations in any business. With the latest development in reservations, you can now expedite your goods movement processes by posting a goods movement directly from a reservation. You can do this using the app Manage Material Documents for Reservations (App ID: F7279). 

Key Features 

The Manage Material Documents for Reservations app offers several functionalities to enhance your goods movement processes: 

  • Direct Posting: Post a goods issue directly from a reservation for supported movement types, such as Goods Issue to Cost Center (201) and Goods Issue for Order (261). 
  • Bulk Processing: Post goods issues for multiple items simultaneously, saving time and effort. 
  • Draft Management: Manage drafts of material documents to ensure accuracy before final posting. 

How-To Post a Goods Movement from a Reservation

Starting in the Manage Reservation Items app, choose a reservation with movement type 201 or 261. With the Create Goods Movement button, you will navigate to the Manage Material Documents for Reservations app where you can post your goods issue. 

Step-by-Step Procedure: 

  1. Select a Reservation: Begin by finding a reservation with a supported movement type, such as 201. 
  2. Initiate Goods Movement: Click on 'Create Goods Movement' from the table toolbar. 
  3. Adjust Details: In the Manage Material Documents for Reservations app, adjust the quantity if needed and add a storage location. 
  4. Add Items: To include additional items, click 'Add'. A pop-up will display possible reservation items. Select and add them to your material document. 
  5. Enhance Details: For each line item, you can add short text or serial numbers if applicable. Click 'Apply' to save changes. 
  6. Finalize Posting: Once all details are confirmed, click the 'Post Goods Issue' button to complete the process.

By following these steps, you can ensure a seamless and efficient goods movement process directly from reservations.

Click the image below to see the process in a how-to video:

entry.title: Troubleshooting guide for issues when using API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog I will outline the steps you can follow to troubleshoot issues when calling the API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV and common questions and errors that can arise from it use.

I work in Technical Support for S/4HANA Cloud and help Customers with issues involving our API and see recurring themes and though it was best to create a guide customer can follow in how to maintain the correct payload / communication user setup so they can upload and download attachments without contacting SAP Support. 

 

This guide will not cover issues involving Harmonized Document Management (HDM)  

 

When investigating issue involving the API API_CV_ATTACHMENT the points I check are 

  • Check Communication Scenario assigned is correct.  
  • Check BusinessObjectTypeName used in the payload is correct. 
  • Check LinkedSAPObjectKey is in the right format. 

 

Below I will outline different scenarios to illustrate how I perform these checks. 

 

Scenario 1: Check Communication Scenario assigned is correct.  

What Communication Scenario do I need to assign for adding or download attachments from an object like Sales Order, Purchase Order, Product? 

The First step to answer this question is to check the SAP API Hub for our API  API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV and section Communication Scenarios . Here you can see all the communication scenarios that use our Attachment API. 

 

It might be not clear how to make the association between the communication scenario and the object to which you want add or retrieve an attachment so you take a communication scenario, like Sales Order Integration (SAP_COM_0109) that you suspect can be used for Attachments with Sales Orders and search the Help Portal (Documentation) resource for S/4HANA Cloud. 

 

In the search results you will find entries for the communication scenario and the API used to update / create the master object itself like API_SALES_ORDER_SRV for Sales 

 

If you click on these links and navigate to the application specific documentation it should outline how to add, read, or delete attached using our Attachment API 

 

For the property BusinessObjectTypeName you can see the value BUS2032 (sales order) is shown.  

This confirms that to use the API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV for Sales Order attachments the communication scenario SAP_COM_0109 needs to be assigned.  

 

Scenario 2: Check BusinessObjectTypeName used in the payload is correct. 

Why do I get the authorization error like ‘User has no authorization for operation XX on object’ When  using the API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV and Entity GetAllOriginals? 

 

The reason is usually to the wrong or missing assignment of Communication Scenario to a communication user or the parameter LinkedSAPObjectKey is in the wrong format. 

 

Example: 

The API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV is called with a Communication User that has SAP_COM_0008 assigned. 

In Postman a GET Request using the Communication User and payload below is used 

/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/GetAllOriginals?LinkedSAPObjectKey='5123456782024'&BusinessObjectTypeName='BUS2081' 

Postman returns the Response: 

User has no authorization for operation XX on object BUS2081  

 

Troubleshooting steps: 

The first step is to clarify what object you want to retrieve the attachment meta information from. 

The example involves the BusinessObjectTypeName 'BUS2081' 

Using the steps provided in Scenario 1, I search the Help Portal (Documentation) resource for S/4HANA Cloud for 'BUS2081' to find the application specific documentation and in the search results I find “Attachments within Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0057” 

 

When navigating to this documentation I can see the following information 

Within the communication scenario SAP_COM_0057 the following services are available: 

  • Supplier Invoice – Create (A2X) 
  • Supplier Invoice – Create, Read, Release, Reverse 
  • Attachment - Create, Read, Rename, Delete 

 

BusinessObjectTypeName: Defines the business object for the supplier invoice BUS2081 (supplier invoice) 

LinkedSAPObjectKey: Enter the key without space between the numbers for the invoice and the fiscal year. <invoice number><fiscal year> 

 

In the example I want to retrieve attachment meta information from a supplier invoice so I can see 

I’m using the correct BusinessObjectTynameName BUS2081 in my payload. 

The LinkedSAPObjectKey I am supplying in the payload '5123456782024' is in the correct format. 

(Invoice Number 51234567 and Fiscal year 2024 concatenated without spaces) 

The last check then is the communication scenario I have assigned to my communication user. I have assigned SAP_COM_0008 and the Documentation requires SAP_COM_0057 to be able to use BusinessObjectTypeName BUS2081. 

This appears to be the reason the authorization error ‘User has no authorization for operation XX on object BUS2081 ‘is raised. 

If I assign SAP_COM_0057 to my communication user, the authorization error will not occur. 

 

Scenario 3: Check LinkedSAPObjectKey is in the right format. 

Why do I get the authorization error like ‘You have No Authorization for Attachment’ when adding an  attachment using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV and Entity AttachmentContentSet? 

The same steps outlined in Scenario 2 apply here as well. It can be due to either the correct  

Communication Scenario is not assigned or the parameter LinkedSAPObjectKey in the payload is in the wrong format. 

 

Example : 

 

The API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV is called with a Communication User that has SAP_COM_0002 assigned. 

In Postman a POST Request using the Communication User, URL 

/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet and payload below is used 

Postman returns the Response: "You have No Authorization for Attachment”. 

Troubleshooting steps: 

As stated previously, the initial step is to clarify that I have the correct communication scenario assigned and LinkedSAPObjectKey is in the correct format. 

I search the Help Portal (Documentation) resource for S/4HANA Cloud with SAP_COM_0002 to find the master data API for updating the object involved. 

 

 

I can see in the results the Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0002 is used in Finance. 

When navigating to the application specific document I can see SAP_COM_0002 is used for creating / updating and reading from Journal Entries. 

In the example payload, I want to add an attachment (PDF document ) to a Journal Entry so the Communication Scenario  that I’m using  (SAP_COM_0002 ) appears to be correct 

Next, I need to verify I’m using the right BusinessObjectTypeName 

In my example I have specified BusinessObjectTypeName as BKPF 

I search the Help Portal (Documentation) resource for S/4HANA Cloud and no application specific document is available For SAP_COM_0002 and BusinessObjectTypeName  BKPF .  

I search the Support Launchpad and find the KBA  Journal Entry Attachments not returned when using the API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV which confirms BKPF is the correct BusinessObjectTypeName  is use. 

We have verified the correct communication scenario to use and BusinessObjectTypeName so next step is to ensure the LinkedSAPObjectKey I have maintained is in the correct format. 

In our example we have supplied LinkedSAPObjectKey  as  is 1900000001 ( The Journal Entry ) 

The KBA (Journal Entry Attachments not returned when using the API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV) outlines the Format of the LinkedSAPObjectKey when using BusinessObjectTypeName BKPF 

“For BusinessObjectTypeName BKPF should be should be built by combination of key fields which is company, document number and year. 

Please take care of the document number.  The document number field has length 10. if you document number length is less than 10, please add leading zero.” 

If I apply this logic to my LinkedSAPObjectKey the result is 100019000000012024  

If I try again using a Post request using the same communication scenario and BusinessObjectTypeName but this time with LinkedSAPObjectKey as 100019000000012024 , the document should be upload and no error ‘You have No Authorization for Attachment’ raised. 

 

Useful KBA’s and Blogs

'User has no authorization for operation 03 on object BUS2037' when calling API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV , Entity GetAllOriginals 

Error 'User has no authorization for operation 03 on object VBRK_BD' when calling API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV, Entity GetAllOriginals   

Message 'The URL you entered is not configured as a trusted site' when attaching document in an App or using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV    

Cloud Integration (SAP CPI) - API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV (OData API for attachments)

Maintain Assignment of Document Info Record to Maintenance Task Lists via API, OAuth and Postman 

Create a pdf attachment using the Attachments API in S/4HANA Cloud

 Access a sales order document through an external system using the Attachments API

entry.title: Coming Up: Change in Preparation Plan for C_S4CFI
entry.content:
Hey there, if you're thinking about getting certified in SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Financial Accounting, listen up! The current certification version (C_S4CFI_2408) is going to be retired on March 31st, 2025. But don't worry, a new version will be available from April 1st, 2025.

 

 

Please be aware that the current certification version (C_S4CFI_2408) will be retired on March 31st, 2025. A new version will be available from April 1st, 2025. Why is this important?

Updated certification versions are nothing unusual. However, the upcoming version of this certification will have an impact on your learning preparation.

If you plan to book your exam before April 1st, 2025 your preparation for this attempt is not affected by this change. Just follow the preparation plan that is recommended in the certification description.

Otherwise, if you plan to take the exam from April 1st or later, then please be prepared that the following learning journeys and courses will be certification relevant:

Designing the Record-to-Report Process in SAP S/4HANA

  • F1211 Detailing Accruals Management
  • F1212 Detailing Financial Statement Reporting

Configuring the Record-to-Report Process in SAP S/4HANA

  • F1251 Detailing Configuration of R2R Posting Processes

Using the Payables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA 

  • F1221 Detailing Down Payments Execution
  • F1222 Detailing the Configuration for the Payment Run
  • F1223 Detailing Process Automation in Accounts Payable

Operating the Receivables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA  

  • F1231 Detailing Special G/L Transactions in Accounts Receivable
  • F1233 Detailing SAP Cash Application and Processing Rules for Bank Statements
  • F1234 Detailing Dispute and Collections Management
  • F1235 Detailing Credit Management Processes in Accounts Receivable
  • F1236 Detailing the Dunning Run

Designing the Asset Accounting Process in SAP S/4HANA

  • F1241 Detailing Settings for Asset Accounting
  • F1242 Detailing Asset Accounting Integration Aspects
  • F1243 Detailing Asset Accounting Year-end closing activities

In addition to this, let me give you a heads up about a change that's coming up. We're going to be making some technical changes to how we publish our courses, and because of that, your learning progress displayed on learning.sap.com might end up getting lost. So I just wanted to remind you to keep track of your own learning progress.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2024年04月 – 2024年06月）
entry.content:
本文主要收集了与SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition集成扩展相关的常见问题(2024年04月 – 2024年06月)，按照主要问询对象API，CDS View，CPI，自定义字段和逻辑以及集成迁移相关对常见问题进行了大致的分类。客户可以点击下方链接查看到相关问题。

 

接口与集成相关问题

 

问题：客户想知道采购订单审批相关的API或CDS

解答：目前没有准确的相关的API或CDS，可以参考下面的CDS：

I_WorkflowStatusOverview

I_WorkflowStatusDetails

Scenario ID：WS00800238           Workflow Name：Workflow for Purchase Order

 

问题：采购申请API上如何添加组件的Subcontracting item，因委外采购申请需从外围系统发起，需做系统对接

解答：通过标准采购申请API无法添加组件

 

问题：客户想要知道是否可以通过API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV来更改supplier batch字段？

解答：当使用API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV做posting GR的时候，不支持输入supplier batch字段，因此不能通过API更新。

 

问题：用户需要S/4HANA Cloud消息推送与企业微信的集成

解答：可参考以下白皮书文档：

https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/p/pdf/asset/preview/qxvTx2x?ltr=a&rc=10&doi=SAP1078633

 

问题：采购订单备注字段的API接口如何获取

解答：通过以下接口可以获取采购订单明细的备注字段：

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrderItem/4500169906/0010/_PurchaseOrderItemNote

 

问题：客户在使用journal entry的SOAP API创建的时候出错，是关于自定义的字段出错。

解答：关于如何在journal entry日记账分录API中创建和使用自定义字段，可以参考以下博客文章：

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/guidelines-for-creating-and-enabling-extension-field-for-journal-entry-api/ba-p/13421678

 

问题：系统登录和使用非常慢，转圈，平均打开每个页面需要2分钟，外围系统接口交互异常，处理起来也频繁出错

解答：是由于数据库服务器上的memory issue，数据库自动恢复了，数据库和应用层的连接之后也恢复了。经过调查研究，memory issue是由于HANA DB的一个bug造成的，新版本的HANA DB已经修复此bug。

 

问题：使用接口 /sap/bc/srt/scs_ext/sap/fixedassetcreatemain 或/sap/bc/srt/scs_ext/sap/fixedassetchange 创建或修改固定资产成功或失败都没有信息返回。

解答：因为是异步API，所以是正常行为。如果需要查看信息，可以去Message Dashboard查看。

 

问题：客户想要知道是否有接口可以新增工单组件？

解答：如果是三系统客户，可以使用以下接口做扩展开发：

https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_PRODUCTIONORDERTP

但是，如果是二系统客户，确实没有这样的一个可用接口。

 

问题：客户想要通过API接口提取SAP内的所有会计凭证，例如包括费用报销、销售成本、生产成本、付款、收款等业务场景，想咨询应该使用API_GLACCOUNTLINEITEM还是API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV？这两个有什么区别？

解答：API_GLACCOUNTLINEITEM可以读取General ledger view的journal entry行项目；API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV可以读取entry view的journal entry，但是它不是用来抽取大量数据的。具体可参考以下两个链接：

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b978f98fc5884ff2aeb10c8fdeb8a43b/80214b5ede2f4e97b640137a4eca208a.html?locale=en-US&q=API_GLACCOUNTLINEITEM

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b978f98fc5884ff2aeb10c8fdeb8a43b/c024170fa7af40878975e218f3426387.html?locale=en-US&q=API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV

 

问题：客户通过自定义CDS的接口读取数据，发现返回数据特别慢。

解答：发现在系统慢的时候，同时有大量的并行的API调用API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV/A_BillOfMaterial，这些并行处理占据了大部分的会话进程，导致其他的调用非常慢。为了避免这个问题，推荐把这些调用绑定，而不是并行大量地同时调用。

 

问题：通过接口  /API_INFORECORD_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurgInfoRecdOrgPlantData (PurchasingInfoRecord='xxx',PurchasingInfoRecordCategory='0',PurchasingOrganization='xxx',Plant='xxx') 来修改采购信息记录，payload如下：

{

    "IsMarkedForDeletion": false

}

但是报错：

error": {

        "code": "/IWBEP/CM_MGW_RT/022",

        "message": {

            "lang": "zh",

            "value": "Please check key fields of URI and payload"

        },

        "innererror": {

            "application": {

                "component_id": "MM-PUR-VM-REC",

                "service_namespace": "/SAP/",

                "service_id": "API_INFORECORD_PROCESS_SRV",

                "service_version": "0001"

            },

            "transactionid": "335BF710CCFC0210E006645265FF29DA",

            "timestamp": "20240516135151.5639670",

            "Error_Resolution": {

                "SAP_Transaction": "For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",

                "SAP_Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"

            },

解答：在payload中，除了要更改的字段，把key fields也放到payload中，修改后的payload如下：

{

    "PurchasingInfoRecord": "xxx",

    "PurchasingInfoRecordCategory": "0",

    "PurchasingOrganization":"xxx",

    "Plant":"xxx",

    "IsMarkedForDeletion": false

}

 

 

 

CDS视图相关问题

 

问题：税码对应的税率在哪个CDS或者API接口可以取到？

解答：在目前的版本中，没有可用的CDS可以取到税码对应的税率，用户需要使用SSCUI 101016来查看税码和税率。目前有以下类似的CIP请求，有类似需求可以打开链接投票：

CDS view for BSET table

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/231702

Release Used in Cloud Development for I_TaxCode

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/317901

Extension of the already existing CDS view I_TaxCode with the actual TaxRate

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/311388

 

问题：在自定义CDS视图中不能新建CDS视图

解答：首先第一，创建自定义CDS视图不能在P系统中做，必须在Q/D系统中新建之后再传输。

然后如果在Q/D系统中也不能新建，则需要去检查权限问题，是否有需要的角色和业务目录，在restriction里面的写入权限是不是un-restricted。

 

 

扩展开发相关问题

 

问题：对于科目类型为M/A/S的日记账分录行项目，自定义字段可以被更改。客户想要更改科目类型为D的行项目中的自定义字段，想问需要在业务上下文FINS_CODING_BLOCK或FINS_JOURNAL_ENTRY_ITEM中创建自定义字段吗？

解答：按照Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3448139 ， 增加的自定义字段只能针对科目类型为M/A/S的行项目更改或保存，不支持科目类型为D或者K的。如需实现功能，按照KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2963059  提交新功能。

 

问题：客户通过自定义业务对象自开发的App，在生产系统中找不到了，但是在测试系统中还是可以看到。

解答：这个通过自定义业务对象自开发的App，分配了业务目录SAP_CORE_BC_EXT，但是该业务目录已经弃用。需要把新的业务目录分配给自定义业务对象就可以解决该问题。

 

 

其他问题

 

问题：迁移主控室创建物料主数据提示错误“Virus scanner could not * *”

解答：virus scanner configuration里有问题，联系SAP operation团队帮助修复问题。

 

问题：导入产品主数据，发生错误"The custom property LANGUAGE is missing in the uploaded file."

解答：导致这个问题的原因是模板文件格式的问题，复制数据到模板里的时候，只拷贝值，不用复制格式等其他信息。

 

问题：客户的IAS打不开了：https://XXX.accounts.ondemand.com/admin/

解答：使用新连接：

https://XXX.accounts.sapcloud.cn/admin

 

问题：使用App Mass Changes to Purchasing Info Records来修改物料的采购信息记录的价格（PPR0）时，根据模板导入，但是系统只更新了第一条记录的价格，其他的记录没有更新成功。

解答：如何通过导入Excel文件的方式来修改采购信息记录的价格，可参考以下链接：

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/offline-price-update-for-purchasing-info-record-via-microsoft-excel/ba-p/13538542

 

问题：是否有方法可以进行批次的批量转移？（Mass transfer stock from batch to batch）

解答：目前没有app或transaction可以做mass goods movement posting。在MIGO/Post Goods Movement里，选择Detail Data section，然后可以复制/粘贴物料、plant等信息。但是不能通过导入Excel文件的方式来实现批量操作。

 

 

 

 

以上为本次分享的全部内容。若想要了解往期更多有关集成扩展的常问问题，可以点击下方链接进行查看：

 

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年01月 – 2022年03月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年04月 – 2022年06月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年07月 – 2022年09月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年10月 – 2022年12月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年01月 – 2023年03月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年04月 – 2023年06月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年07月 – 2023年09月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2023年10月 – 2023年12月)：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2024年01月 – 2024年03月)：click here.

entry.content:

(Before you can access the link, a one-time registration in the SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required. A detailed step-by-step guide on how to register can be found here.)

ServiceAimWhen to UseAdditional Information
CQC for Transformation AssessmentGauge/provide feedback on your project team’s awareness of topics and resources that are critical to project success

Prepare session in prepare phase

Realize session in the realize phase

Two months prior to go live

Service will review the usage of your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition solution and help you improve current business processes and adopt new business processes.

Review the solution under data volume management and information lifecycle management aspects

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Singapore GST InvoiceNow
entry.content:
GST InvoiceNow - submission of invoice data to Singapore Tax Authority (IRAS)

Image from IRAS GST InvoiceNow page

On April 15, 2024, The Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (IRAS) published media release "Implementation of InvoiceNow for GST-Registered Businesses and free InvoiceNow Services for Newly In..." in the Newsroom. GST-registered businesses will be required to use InvoiceNow solutions to transmit the invoice data directly to IRAS for tax administration. By transmitting invoice data directly to IRAS via the InvoiceNow solutions, GST- registered businesses can streamline their compliance processes, reduce data preparation efforts for their submissions to IRAS and enjoy faster GST refunds.

GST InvoiceNow requirement will be implemented in phases, starting with soft launch from May 2025, allowing any existing GST-registered businesses that wish to be early adopters to transmit invoice data to IRAS using InvoiceNow solutions via InvoiceNow network.

  • From 1 May 2025, for GST-registered businesses that wish to be early adopters.
  • From 1 November 2025, for newly incorporated companies[1] that voluntarily apply for GST registration.
  • From 1 April 2026, for all businesses that voluntarily apply for GST registration.

IRAS will continue to consult industry partners on the initiative and carefully review the feedback received before announcing further details for the remaining GST-registered businesses. 

InvoiceNow solutions are finance and accounting software that allow the transmission of invoices between businesses via the InvoiceNow network. InvoiceNow solutions will be connected to IRAS through Access Points (AP). This connection will enable the transmission of invoice data to IRAS via Application Programming Interface (API) technology. 

Invoices that are not issued using InvoiceNow (e.g. for sales made via point-of-sale systems) should also be recorded in InvoiceNow solutions and sent to IRAS.

The scope of invoice data covers the transactions with GST tax categories of (1) Standard-rate supplies, (2) Zero-rated supplies and (3) Standard-rated purchases on which input tax claims are made or will be made. For (1) & (3) excludes reverse charge supplies and reverse charge purchases.

For more information on the GST InvoiceNow requirement, please check to the IRAS GST InvoiceNow Requirement webpage here.

SAP is an InvoiceNow solution for both Access Point Provider and InvoiceNow-Ready Solution Provider and is currently developing SAP Document and Reporting solution to support GST InvoiceNow requirement, please check the plan & update at regulatory change manager 

Once the solution is ready, the how-to-implement will be published here.

Get to know about Peppol eInvoices or InvoiceNow solution in Singapore, please check the blogs: -

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Singapore Peppol eInvoices (InvoiceNow) - Part 1

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Singapore Peppol eInvoices (InvoiceNow) - Part 2

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This blog is intended to provide Customers and Partners the guide or where to start of how to implement SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, for Singapore GST InvoiceNow requirement.

Please share your feedback and thoughts in a comment. If you have questions about SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, you can post your question here.

entry.title: Customer Engagement Initiative 2025 on Business Event Logging
entry.content:
As part of the new CEI cycle for 2025 we launched a CEI project for Business Event Logging. Registration is open until March 28, 2025.

Business Event Logging allows you to create event logs in SAP S/4HANA systems and on SAP BTP ABAP Environment, based on Business Events and on Change Documents. The logs can be used to evaluate changes to your business documents, and to analyze your business processes with the help of SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

Register here until March 28, 2025: Insights into Business Processes with Business Event Logging 

We plan to roll-out information about the usage of Business Event Logging, and collect your feedback and ideas.

Find more information about Business Event Logging here:

  • One Tool to Track Them All 
  • Using Customer-Defined Events in Business Event Logging
  • Integrating Business Event Logging with SAP Signavio
  • Transform your Business Processes with SAP Signavio and SAP Build 

Looking forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud Using Data Import API
entry.content:
This blog post aims to bring some introduction about the usage of SAC Data Import APIs and how they can be leveraged to replicate data to Public Dimensions. It will also describe of one use case implemented recently to fulfill particular requirements without going with the standard communication scenario.

Data Import APIs can be leveraged to replicate transactional and master data to SAP Analytics Cloud.

The API includes 5 different services that can be used via API endpoints. These can be tested using an API Client or Platform such as Postman, Insomnia.

  • Models service
  • PublicDimensions service
  • CurrencyConversions service
  • Jobs service
  • Import service

For more information about the these 5 services please consult this document inHelp Portal.

Also available inSAP Business Accelerator Hub.

Use Case (Example): Replicate Enterprise Project individually to SAP Analytics Cloud after creation or change in S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Purpose of Use Case:

Replicate Enterprise Projects based on creation (or change) action in S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Keep in mind this is just an example originated from a real requirement but can be adapted, with the respective complexity, to any other object if it fulfills the necessary conditions and systems involved to satisfy the need to replicate an object on individual basis from S4 Public Cloud to SAC.

Ultimately, this is available for any other middleware or point-to-point consumption if the Sender system allows it.

An High-Level Diagram with the components involved is available below:

  • One SAP BTP Subaccount where Event Mesh and Integration Suite are subscribed with respective instances and applications. For more information how to setup the Event Mesh from SAP Integration Suite check the following document.
  • S/4HANA Public Cloud
  • SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Cloud Identity Services is a nice-to-have in this example but logically for productive scenarios it shall be included in the overall architecture.

 

Image Caption: Technical Architecture Design

 

 

After understanding which components are used in this scenario, next level Diagram explains the data flow between each SAP component to leverage the Data Import API. Remember that it can be adapted to use one of the other 5 services although might require adjustments, especially in the interface in SAP Integration Suite.

Pre-Requisites:

  • SAP Event Mesh and SAP Integration Suite integrated
  • S/4HANA Public Cloud Integrated with SAP Integration Suite, using for example OAUTH Client Credentials
  • S/4HANA Public Cloud Integrated with SAP Event Mesh. Consult the following document in case more information is needed to perform this step.
  • SAP Analytics Cloud configured with one Public Dimension and with OAUTH Authentication configured to be consumed by SAP Integration Suite. For more information how to configure the authentication, consult this document.

 

Image Caption: Process Flow Architecture Diagram

 

 

As legend for the above diagram, explaining the data flow process:

Business User executes a create or change action on the respective business object. In this use case the Enterprise Project.

  1. Create or Change event in S/4HANA Public Cloud releases that outbound even message towards Event Mesh, previously configured;
  2. Event Mesh consumes and subsequently is consumed by SAP Integration Suite;
  3. Once the event is received, SAP Integration Suite extracts the Enterprise Project ID to then execute a GET Call based on the Enterprise Project ODATA API to receive the object data payload to deliver to SAP Analytics Cloud;
  4. SAP Integration Suite interface needs to transform the payload into the structure the Public Dimension expects to successfully replicate it. This has been done via message mapping element but can be accomplished with a script as well;
  5. Finally, the delivery of the message to the dataimport API requires first an authentication, using OAUTH mechanism for example to post the data into the respective PublicDimension which will be defined in the HTTP endpoint.
    1. At this final step, as described in the documentation, SAC demands the CSRF Token which needs to be retrieved first and sent as Header in the final step. This step is described in this document.

 

The following diagram presents a simple example of an interface executing all the steps mentioned above from SAP Integration Suite perspective.

 

Image Caption: The main integration flow with all the steps to accomplish a simple scenario without complex error handling mechanism.

 

Image Caption: Local Integration Process to Post the Payload into SAP Analytics Cloud.

One important caveat to be successful is to understand the Public Dimension data structure. All the necessary attributes, either mandatory or optional, need to be included in the message mapping. If not, the execution will fail.

This can be either assessed from SAC UI, going into the Public Dimension and check the properties.

Image Caption: SAP Analytics Cloud – Modeler – Public Dimension

 

Alternatively, via GET Call, using for example Postman, this information can also be retrieved using the Public Dimension metadata, using the following URL:

https://{host}/api/v1/dataimport/publicDimensions/{publicDimensionID}/metadata

This procedure is explained in this document. One might see that in the Sample Response, all attributes part of the Public Dimension are retrieved with their respective data types and key identification.

Image Caption: Public Dimension Metadata Response Sample

 

 In case of failed executions/messages, SAC also provides a mechanism to verify and understand the job failure. If you remember, I mentioned the dataimport API includes 5 services, being one of them for “Jobs”.

For example /jobs/{jobID}/invalidRows can be used to assess what failed during the data import into the respective Public Dimension.

There are additional examples available in SAP Business Accelerator HUB, such as S/4HANA Pricing Information to SAP Analytics Cloud.

Hope this particular scenario can be of any service for particular situations and requirements.

Happy testing and continuous learning. Share with us any interesting use cases you have implemented which can support others and reach out in case of any issues.

SAP Analytics Cloud #SAC Data Import API SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: SAP 公有云替代料的使用
entry.content:
SAP中的替代物料有几种，比如生产订单中A物料用完之后系统自动切换到B物料（使用物料主数据MRP4视图中的 “后继物料” 字段），或者在BOM中设置主物料和替代物料的优先级，当主物料库存够，可用性检查取主物料，主物料库存不够但替代料库存够，可用性检查取替代料；或者 主物料用80% 替代物料用20% （使用BOM中的固定比例）。

本文主要介绍下替代料在BOM中的使用，

在创建或更改BOM时，在对应的组件行项中创建 “替代项目组”，将主料和替代料设在一个“替代项目组”中。

主料设置：

优先级设为：1     策略选择：1     使用率：100%

替代料设置：

优先级设为：2     策略选择：1     使用率：空

在工单中进行 “可用性检查”时，一般根据 订单数量，主料库存数量 和 替代料库存数量决定选择。

  1. 当主料库存数量 > 替代料库存数量，可用性检查时系统都会自动选择主料。
  2. 当主料库存数量 < 替代料库存数量时：

a.主料库存数量 >= 订单数量时，可用性检查时，系统会自动选择主料。

举例：订单数量是100， 主料库存120，替代料库存是150.

               可用性检查会选择 主料

b. 主料库存数量< 订单数量，且替代料库存数量 > = 订单数量时，系统会自动选择替代料。

举例：订单数量150， 主料库存 120， 替代料库存150.

这时可用性检查发现 主料库存无法满足订单需求，替代料库存满足订单需求，系统就会选择替代料。

c. 主料库存数量< 订单数量，且替代料库存数量 <订单数量时,系统会自动选择主料。

举例：订单数量 200，主料库存120， 替代料库存150.

这时可用性检查发现 主料和替代料的库存都不满足需求，系统会自动选择主料。这块因为前面的BOM的设置，系统只会在 主料和替代料中选择一个。

如果想 主料和替代料的库存都被用到，那可以调整BOM中的设置，设置固定的比例，那系统会按固定比例在订单中 分配 主料和辅料的使用量。

主料BOM设置：

替代料设置：

举例说明：

BOM设置： 主料占比 80%， 替代料占比20%。

订单数量200， 那系统会固定按 主料 200*80%= 160， 替代料 200 *20%= 40，这时进行可用性检查，只会检查库存数量是否满足，但不会改变订单中的组件数量。

entry.title: Be Part of Tomorrow: Join SAP's Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 1, 2025!
entry.content:
We’re thrilled to announce the launch of the first cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative for 2025, featuring 50 exciting new projects aimed at fostering innovation and collaboration with our valued SAP customers and partners.

In today’s fast-paced business world, staying ahead is more important than ever. The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative presents a unique opportunity to gain early insights into SAP’s product developments. By participating, you’ll work directly with our developers and product managers, helping shape the future of our products.

Register until March 28, 2025! Don’t miss out on the opportunity to have your voice heard and influence the next generation of SAP solutions.

To help you explore the available projects, we’ve compiled a detailed list for your convenience. Check out the full list here or follow the links below to discover the exciting opportunities:

ABAP

  • ABAP Cloud Development Assistant
  • OData UI Service from scratch Generator

SAP Business Technology Platform

  • BTP AI based Data Anonymization Service
  • Create AI-driven extensions and automations with SAP Build
  • Improving the Admin's and Solution Architect's Experience on SAP BTP
  • SAP BPM, SAP BRM and SAP Process Orchestration migration to Cloud
  • SAP BTP Cockpit, Cloud Foundry UIs
  • SAP BTP Usability Event - User research project
  • SAP Business Technology Platform: Multi-Region Desaster Recovery
  • SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Provisioning, Integration with Joule 
  • SAP Integration Suite

SAP Concur

  • SAP Concur - AI Managed Expense Reports
  • SAP Concur - Dynamic Card Management – Virtual Credit Cards
  • SAP Concur Expense - Web Services for Financial Integration
  • SAP Concur Mobile app and the sign-in user experience
  • SAP Concur Solutions – All About E-Receipts
  • SAP Concur Solutions - Customer Managed Keys for granular control over data
  • SAP Concur Solutions - Sponsored Guest Feature
  • SAP Concur Solutions - Web Notifications Center and Preferences

SAP Customer Experience

  • Research project into a potential loyalty cloud solution
  • SAP CX AI Toolkit

Data & Analytics

  • Redesigning the Dashboard Experience
  • SAP HANA Cloud Elastic Compute Node
  • SAP HANA Database Migration to SAP HANA Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Bank Relationship Management: Improving Overview, Services & Fee, and Interest Calculations
  • Fiori First for Sales Order Management
  • Identifying and resolving critical situations in a production planners day in S/4HANA Public Cloud
  • Identity and Access Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Insights into Business processes with Business Event Logging
  • Joule and GenAI use cases in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
  • New Financial Reporting for Enterprise Project (Project Booklet) including ETO
  • Planned New Solution for Cost Component Breakdown
  • Project staffing, consider dependencies across different roles in a project
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Product Change Management
  • Simplification of transports in SAP S/4HANA® Cloud Public Edition, three-system landscape
  • Usability Improvements for managing attachments in S/4HANA business applications

SAP Globalization

  • Australia and New Zealand: GST requirement for Down payments
  • Australia: Modified Payment Times Report - AASB 8 and Taxable Payments Annual Report
  • ISO 21378 Audit Data Collection Standard
  • Planned enhancements to Run statutory reports to handle Draft Report reconciliation
  • Sales and Use Tax Reporting in United States - User Research
  • Sales and Use Tax payments in United States

Lifecycle Management

  • DevOps with ABAP

SAP Integration Experience Feedback goes SAP Customer Engagement Initiative

  • Assisted Assessment of Aligned Business APIs for External Workforce
  • Assisted Assessment of Aligned Business APIs for Hire to Retire Cloud
  • Assisted Assessment of Aligned Business APIs for Source-to-Pay

Others

  • Research into AI-Assisted User Learning Rollout for Adoption
  • SAP Reference Architecture in SAP LeanIX
  • Shape the future of SAP Cloud ALM Configuration & Security Analysis
  • The AI-Driven Future of New Product Introduction (NPI)

We believe that collaboration is key to sparking innovation. By working alongside our customers and partners, we can jointly shape the future of SAP’s products and transform business operations.

Let’s take this journey together. Together, we have the power to drive progress and transform industries.

Don’t miss out – sign up today at influence.sap.com and be a part of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 1 in 2025!

Warm regards, 
Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team 

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

entry.title: Import Financial Plan Data - Understanding the plan data scope
entry.content:
The Import Financial Plan Data app is available in SAP S/4HANA, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public edition and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private edition. It allows key users to import plan data line items from CSV files.

Understanding Plan Data Scope

This blog post will explain how the plan data scope works and how it helps you avoid accidently overwriting data.
Please keep in mind that the Import Financial Plan Data app is only an interface for uploading data into the system. The data has to be maintained and reviewed manually before uploading it, as  only technical checks are performed (for example, checking whether master data exists in the target system) and no business logic is integrated.

Let us explore how to use the Import Financial Plan Data app in a simple scenario for cost center planning.

Example Scenarios

Example 1: Initial Import
In the example provided, you intend to import four plan data records. Since this is the first time the application is being used, no records are present in the database. This means four new records will be incorporated from the CSV file, as shown in the following screens:

After importing the plan data, you then see a success message that allows you to run the Display Financial Plan Data report directly. This report displays the plan data on the corresponding accounts, indicating that the outcome is as expected.

Example 2: Correcting Data
Suppose you notice that one of the amounts in your file was incorrect. To correct this, simply change the amount from 100 to 150 USD, and import the file again. The import process informs you that the existing plan data will be adapted within the plan data scope and that four records will be incorporated from the CSV file.

After the successful import, the Display Financial Plan Data report shows the corrected amount of 150 USD.

Example 3: Adding Missing Accounts
In another example, you may have forgotten to upload the plan data for a specific account. In this case, you merely need to reimport the file, including the new account.

The system notifies you that the existing plan data will be adapted within the plan data scope and that five records will be incorporated from the CSV file.
Consequently, the Display Financial Plan Data report now displays the plan data for the missing account as well.

 

Example 4: Handling Complex Scenarios
Let us now examine how the system handles more complex scenarios or repetitive imports.
To reverse specific records before importing a new CSV file, the system creates a logical query based on the dimensions included in the file. Dimensions marked with an X in row #3 are concatenated with AND, while the different members in this column are concatenated with OR. For dimensions without an X, the members are not specified, so records for all members of that dimension are reversed.

Note:
This may reverse data values for which there is no corresponding row in the source file because the selection defined by the plan data scope reverses all values for which the following is true, for example:
Plan Category = "PLN"
AND General Ledger Fiscal Year = "2025"
AND Posting Period = "011"
AND Company Code = "1710"
AND (Cost Center = "0017101101" OR Cost Center = "17101201")

In example 3, you mistakenly planned on cost center 1710201, which should not have been planned on. The data you imported in this file is incorrect, and now you wish to send only three records instead of five.
To correct this, you reimport the file with these three records, but you leave the X for the cost center dimension in the file.

This action results in the reversal of the records meeting the following criteria:
Plan Category = "PLN"
AND General Ledger Fiscal Year = "2025"
AND Posting Period = "011"
AND Company Code = "1710"
AND Cost Center = "0017101101"

The erroneous cost center data remains unchanged, so the incorrect data for cost center 1710201 is still present in the system after this import.

To correct the erroneous data, you need to remove the X from the cost center column.

This action results in the reversal of the records meeting the following criteria:
Plan Category = "PLN"
AND General Ledger Fiscal Year = "2025"
AND Posting Period = "011"
AND Company Code = "1710"

This sets the records for cost centers not specified in the CSV file to zero.

 

Example 5: Updating and Adding Records
In this last example, you want to correct one existing record for 2025 from 150 USD to 200 USD and add new records for 2026.

Let’s assume that the data in your system looks as follows:

By importing the CSV file as shown above, the system reverses the plan records for both cost centers and both years. Note, however, that even records that were not part of the uploaded CSV file are also reversed because of the following criteria:
Plan Category = "PLN"
AND (General Ledger Fiscal Year = "2025" OR General Ledger Fiscal Year = "2026")
AND Posting Period = "011"
AND Company Code = "1710"
AND (Cost Center = "0017101101" OR Cost Center ="0017101201")

To resolve this, you need to split your data into two upload files.

One CSV file contains the record that needs to be corrected and where the X is set for all dimensions, including the G/L account.

This changes the amount from 150 USD to 200 USD, while all other records remain unchanged.

The second file contains the new records for 2026, where you don’t need to set the X for the G/L account dimension.

After both CSV files have been uploaded, the data in your system looks as follows:

Conclusion:
To prevent data from being overwritten unintentionally, uploaded data must be disjointed. A clear understanding of the plan data scope ensures that records can be added, updated, and reversed safely.

entry.title: Guiding Your Cloud Journey: The New SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Adoption Plan Roadmap
entry.content:
The Adoption Plan roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is now available in both the SAP Activate Road map viewer and SAP Cloud ALM. Designed to support customers and partners, this new roadmap helps align business priorities and outcomes at the start of their cloud journey with SAP.
This Adoption Plan provides a streamlined set of tasks and tools that enable businesses to continuously identify and adopt the solution features that bring the most value – extending well beyond the initial go-live. It outlines a core set of strategic activities that transform value realization from First Value – to Full Value and continuous innovation.

The Adoption Plan roadmap is structured into distinct phases, each with specific activities and deliverables:

Discover Phase: Identifies and documents initial adoption opportunities in alignment with business goals and outcomes defined during the sales cycle, marking the start of the adoption journey.

Prepare Phase: Initiates the implementation project with strategic and operational planning, prioritizing key functional, localization, and business requirements for fit-to-standard to realize company strategic objectives.

Explore Phase: Conducts fit-to-standard analysis workshops, validating solution functionality within the project scope and ensuring alignment with business needs and priorities.

Realize: Focuses on configuration, practical solutions, and end-to-end walkthroughs as critical components in achieving adoption goals.

Deploy: Includes setting up the production system, executing cutover activities, confirming organizational readiness, and transitioning business operations to the new system.

Run: Ensures continued success and optimization of the solution post go-live. Plan and continuously integrate new technologies and innovations, such as AI and SAP Build, while maximizing the consumption for your subscription entitlements.

Customers can access this roadmap through the SAP Activate road map viewer in SAP for Me or within SAP Cloud ALM. In SAP Cloud ALM, the adoption plan roadmap can be used in two ways:  as a combined roadmap alongside the SAP Activate methodology for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation – recommended for customers beginning their implementation – or as a standalone roadmap to drive ongoing adoption efforts for customers already live on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Watch the video below by clicking the image to learn how to access the content in road map viewer and how to use it in SAP Cloud ALM, either as a combined or standalone roadmap.

We welcome your feedback on this new adoption roadmap! Feel free to share your thoughts in the comments of this blog or through the feedback function in the SAP Activate road map viewer.
